calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2003 Off Calendar

For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Gena Eales.
Appearances:
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the Defendants Epifania N. Shirazi, DDS, Inc.; and Epifania N. Shirazi as follows: Principal of $42,353.08, Attorney's fees of $2,500.00, Costs of $304.50 and Interest of $3,158.64. For the total of $48,316.22.
Plaintiff is entitled to immediate possession of the property from the Defendants. In the event Plaintiff obtains possession of and sells of said property, Defendants shall receive all credits to which they are entitled by law.
Cousel to prepare judgment.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2003 Set For Trial On Nov-24-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
